headline: Is Charles Schwab (SCHW) Pricing Look Attractive After Mixed Recent Returns?
summary: Wondering whether Charles Schwab at around US$91.64 is offering good value or asking too much for its strengths? This article unpacks what the current price really implies. The stock has shown mixed recent returns, with a 3.1% gain over the last 7 days, a 2.5% decline over 30 days, a 9.8% decline year to date, a 13.8% return over the past year and 102.1% over three years. Recent headlines have focused on Charles Schwab's position within US capital markets and its role as a major brokerage...

headline: LPLA Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates as Revenues and Advisory Assets Jump
summary: LPL Financial beats Q1 earnings estimates as revenues jump 35% and advisory assets surge. Rising expenses and softer recruited assets temper the quarter.

headline: Charles Schwab CEO on financial literacy: Investing can make a real difference in your life
summary: Charles Schwab President and CEO Rick Wurster joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss the company's second annual National Investing Day, the importance of financial literacy, his thoughts on Trump accounts, prediction markets, and more.

headline: Schwab Marks Second Annual National Investing Day with Industry and Community Partners
summary: WESTLAKE, Texas, May 01, 2026--Charles Schwab today kicked off the second annual National Investing Day, bringing together organizations from the financial industry and nonprofit community to participate in the day dedicated to investor education and empowerment.
